commands.summary: [AC-2, AC-4] Content validation passed with categorization PBQ schema and original Network+ PBQ netplus-p010.
[AC-2, AC-4] Strict objective coverage validation passed after adding the new Network+ categorization PBQ.
[AC-3, AC-5] Accessibility validator passed including categorization select labels and labelled PBQ feedback.
[AC-2, AC-3] Unit tests passed for categorization grading and content validation.
[AC-2] TypeScript and Vite production build passed with the existing chunk-size warning.
[AC-5] Desktop PBQ Lab smoke reached netplus-p010, verified five categorization selects, selected one answer, and confirmed labelled partial-credit feedback with no console errors.
[AC-5] Mobile PBQ Lab smoke reached netplus-p010, verified five categorization selects, one-column rows, full-width controls, and 44px minimum select height.
[AC-2] Governance validation still fails on the repo-wide preflight-marker requirement affecting existing work items.

environment.process_note: Categorization PBQs shipped as the next-generation PBQ depth slice; browser smoke used the in-app browser because the standalone Playwright Chromium executable was unavailable.
